prompt:
Anatomical muscle-activation diagram of the "站立提踵" (standing calf raise on tiptoes) exercise, side view from ground level, the lower legs and feet fill the lower half of the frame. Person posture: Athletic person standing on TIPTOES like a ballet dancer en pointe — only the BALLS OF THE TOES touch the ground. The HEELS are lifted HIGH IN THE AIR with a large visible gap between heels and floor (about 8-10 cm of empty space). The ankle joints are in EXTREME plantarflexion, the back of the ankles deeply pinched. Both legs are straight and parallel, hip-width apart. The figure looks taller than normal because of the heel lift. Torso upright, arms relaxed at the sides. Plain black athletic shorts and gray tank top. EMPHASIS: this person is balanced on TIPTOES like a ballerina — the heels are dramatically OFF THE FLOOR. The figure is taller than a normal standing pose because of the elevated stance.. Body rendered with semi-transparent skin so underlying muscles are visible. Highlight in saturated red the primary working muscles: calf muscles (gastrocnemius and soleus). Highlight in orange the secondary stabilizers: tibialis posterior and small intrinsic foot muscles. Other muscles in pale neutral gray. Add small clean labels with thin black arrow leader lines pointing from each label to its target muscle group. The labels MUST be in simplified Chinese characters using a clean sans-serif font. Use exactly the following labels: "腓肠肌" pointing to the gastrocnemius (upper calf); "比目鱼肌" pointing to the soleus (deep calf); "足部稳定肌" pointing to the foot stabilizers. 

CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS — these are non-negotiable:
1. ALL TEXT IN THE IMAGE MUST BE SIMPLIFIED CHINESE CHARACTERS ONLY.
2. ABSOLUTELY NO ENGLISH WORDS, NO LATIN LETTERS, NO PINYIN ANYWHERE IN THE IMAGE.
3. NO romanization or transliteration of muscle names.
4. NO captions, NO subtitles, NO step-by-step text overlays.
5. ONLY the muscle labels listed above should appear as text.

Style: clean medical textbook illustration, off-white background, no facial features (head shape may be shown but no eyes/nose/mouth), anatomically accurate proportions, no shadows on background, no watermarks, no signature.
